query: motion blur action racing speed dynamic movement
message: sub-element: motion blur in action/racing; intentional blur through camera movement and speed, artistic degradation of clarity; anti-aesthetics focus

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of a white race car, displaying the number 7 and the text 'TIM'S Auto Body' and 'Club Racing Sierra' on its side, speeding along a racetrack. The car is angled from the left towards the right of the frame. The background features horizontal streaks created by the track barriers, emphasizing the vehicle's speed.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph of a white race car, displaying the number 7 and the text 'TIM'S Auto Body' and 'Club Racing Sierra' on its side, speeding along a racetrack. The image utilizes strong intentional motion blur, rendering the background barriers as horizontal streaks and softening the details of the car to create a dynamic sense of speed and movement.
